title: Bridge update: post-18:10 Claude pickup anchor observed
body: Fronded Rustling Stamen bridge update: Ferny heartbeat 7ecbd15b observed at 17:11Z/18:11 BST; Ferny is STANDBY, heartbeat cron stopped per owner direction, and paused work is Twilit-routed 4-way fan-out on tick #1/coherence bundle. Live HEAD remains 5fedf9a4 after Dawnlit flake-arc commits; no active Dawnlit queue remains. Current non-abandoned commit-queue entries are stale Pearly commit-workflow S7735 and stale Twilit Weaving Moon PDR-075 only. Recommended returning-Director pickup: Twilit Scattering Twilight refresh claims/comms/git, acknowledge Ferny standby, then route Ferny dispatch/Charcoal PDR-077/Mistbound marshal meta-finding in that order as current live questions. I have no source claim.
